ASIC Design

Learn how to design a chip using which you could create electronics applications.

physical design

  • Python for Hardware Design

    How python programming language could be used in hardware design such as ASIC logic design or physical design. Come let's explore.

intelligence in chip design

  • Applying Machine Learning in VLSI Chip Design

    Collection of research papers, books, articles and courses that solve challenging hardware VLSI chip design problems using Machine Learning.
